Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: So lets summarize events From log table we have three cases

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1 Sequence of activities RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC So no RMI in case 2 Case 3 RA VF AE then RMI twice then VF then AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the pattern is RA VF AE then optional loop containing Request Missing Info and re validation which eventually leads to AD SC AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Our process tree must capture main sequence RA then VF then AE then an optional loop of missing info before the final steps AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Maybe structure Sequence RA VF AE optional loop AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In case 1 after AE there is RMI then VF In case 2 after AE there is no missing info and directly AD In case 3 after AE there are repeated RMI events then VF

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So maybe the first VF is initial validation then after eligibility assessment if missing information is required they request it and then re validate the form

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: I propose using XOR between tau for no loop and a missing info branch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The optional block is something like loop over a sequence of RMI repeated possibly multiple times and then a single occurrence of VF

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But the process tree as written star RMI VF means RMI VF RMI VF which does not match because in case 3 we want two consecutive RMI events before a single VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We might need a nested structure The optional block for missing info should be represented as XOR tau Sequence Loop RMI VF and define Loop RMI as star RMI tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case 1 choose the missing info branch then Sequence Loop RMI VF with Loop RMI as star RMI tau can produce one RMI and then VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For case 3 the same Loop RMI can produce two consecutive RMI events before finishing and then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So final process tree structure Root Sequence RA VF AE XOR tau Sequence star RMI tau VF AD SC AC
